description: Resolves custom or relative time bounds against the active pad, well, or stage selection.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH scope AS (SELECT CASE WHEN CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) IN ('', '__ALL__') THEN NULL ELSE CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) END AS selected_well, CASE WHEN CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION) < 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION) END AS selected_stage), pad_bounds AS (SELECT 'pad' AS scope_level, MIN(CAST(w.first_record_ts AS timestamp)) AS first_available_ts, MAX(CAST(w.last_record_ts AS timestamp)) AS last_available_ts FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1 w CROSS JOIN scope sc WHERE sc.selected_well IS NULL AND COALESCE(NULLIF(w.fleet_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :fleet_name AND COALESCE(NULLIF(w.pad_name, ''), 'Unknown') = :pad_name), well_bounds AS (SELECT 'well' AS scope_level, MIN(CAST(w.first_record_ts AS timestamp)) AS first_available_ts, MAX(CAST(w.last_record_ts AS timestamp)) AS last_available_ts FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1 w CROSS JOIN scope sc WHERE sc.selected_well IS NOT NULL AND sc.selected_stage IS NULL AND w.name = sc.selected_well), stage_bounds AS (SELECT 'stage' AS scope_level, MIN(CAST(s.stage_start_ts AS timestamp)) AS first_available_ts, MAX(CAST(s.stage_end_ts AS timestamp)) AS last_available_ts FROM featurestore:merged_td_stage_index_v1 s CROSS JOIN scope sc WHERE sc.selected_well IS NOT NULL AND sc.selected_stage IS NOT NULL AND s.name = sc.selected_well AND s.stage_num_td = sc.selected_stage), selected_bounds AS (SELECT * FROM pad_bounds WHERE first_available_ts IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT * FROM well_bounds WHERE first_available_ts IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT * FROM stage_bounds WHERE first_available_ts IS NOT NULL) SELECT scope_level, CASE WHEN :time_range = 'previous_6h' THEN GREATEST(first_available_ts, last_available_ts - INTERVAL '6 hours') WHEN :time_range = 'previous_12h' THEN GREATEST(first_available_ts, last_available_ts - INTERVAL '12 hours') WHEN :time_range = 'previous_48h' THEN GREATEST(first_available_ts, last_available_ts - INTERVAL '48 hours') WHEN :time_range = 'previous_72h' THEN GREATEST(first_available_ts, last_available_ts - INTERVAL '72 hours') ELSE first_available_ts END AS start_time, last_available_ts AS end_time FROM selected_bounds) q
